name: local_file_search
content: {"skill_name":"local_file_search","status":"success","input":{"query":"[\"步骤1：使用 local_file_search 搜索 docs 目录中与 Memory 相关的文件，query=\"Memory\", root_dir=\"docs\", file_types=[\"txt\",\"md\"], top_k=5\",\"步骤2：从搜索结果中读取最相关的文件内容，使用 file_reader 读取前","root_dir":"docs","top_k":8},"output":{"query":"[\"步骤1：使用 local_file_search 搜索 docs 目录中与 Memory 相关的文件，query=\"Memory\", root_dir=\"docs\", file_types=[\"txt\",\"md\"], top_k=5\",\"步骤2：从搜索结果中读取最相关的文件内容，使用 file_reader 读取前","root_dir":"docs","files_scanned":3,"total_matches":3,"truncated_files":0,"skipped_files":0,"results":[{"path":"docs/agent_intro.txt","score":22.814,"snippet":"Agent 系统通常由模型、工具、记忆和执行循环组成。 工具调用让模型能够读取本地文件、执行计算，并把结果用于后续回答。 Memory 为 Agent 提供全局知识和历史对话上下文。","line_number":3,"match_count":6,"match_type":"token"},{"path":"docs/search_skill_demo.md","score":18.211,"snippet":"# Search Skill Demo 检索演示文档用于验证 local_file_search 工具。 当用户询问“检索演示 工具编排”时，搜索工具应能命中这个文件。 工具编排强调模型先决定调用哪个工具，再由运行时执行工具并把 ToolMessage 返回给模型。","line_number":3,"match_count":5,"match_type":"token"},{"path":"docs/tool_calling.md","score":8.863,"snippet":"docs/tool_calling.md","line_number":null,"match_count":2,"match_type":"token"}]},"error":null,"latency_ms":1.1}
